stanzas:
Kabali Thoondil Meenukku Song Lyrics
Singers: Pradeep Kumar, Kalyani, Dhee
Lyrics: Kabilan

vizhiyaal paarthadhaa
vithayp poochedi
oru thuli mahaiyile
uyir kulam niraiyudhe

vaanam paarthen
azhagiya vinmeen
en pol thoora
paarai nenjam
karaigiradhe

unadhuyir udalodu
enathuyir kalandhene
azhagiya mugam paarkka
mezhugena karaindhene

vaanam paarthen
azhagiya vinmeen
en pol thoora
paarai nenjam
karaigiradhe

pagalinil nilavai pol
unakkul maraindhene
pournami varum innaal
iravilum pagalaanen

thooram pona nilavinai
tholil thaangum neram
thookkam kannil
tholaindhadhadaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thoondil Meenukku'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its poetic lyrics by Kabilan.

How does 'Thoondil Meenukku' fit into the plot of Kabali?

This song reflects the emotional depth of the characters, enhancing the narrative of love and connection in the film.

Who are the singers of 'Thoondil Meenukku'?

The song features the talented voices of Dhee, Kalyani, and Pradeep Kumar.

Who composed the music for 'Thoondil Meenukku'?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was 'Thoondil Meenukku' released?

The song was released on August 27, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thoondil Meenukku, the characters express their deep emotions through a captivating melody that resonates with the audience. The song beautifully encapsulates the themes of love and longing, making it a poignant moment in Kabali. With its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track stands out as a testament to the emotional depth of the film, leaving a lasting impression on listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thoondil Meenukku from Kabali is a mesmerizing blend of soulful melodies and heartfelt lyrics that captures the essence of love and longing. With the unique collaboration of singers Dhee, Kalyani, and Pradeep Kumar, this track resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the enchanting vibes that make this song a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Where does the fish in the net find rest, and where does the flower find its fragrance?
Did you see with your eyes? A flower blooms, and in a single drop of dew, life is abundant.
In a journey, the dawn is also known.
I look at the sky, and my heart feels like a beautiful star shining like me.
I searched the shore for the waves, and I fell in love.
I drank from the sea, and it was all-consuming.
I merged my life with yours, and to see your beautiful face, I melted away.
I look at the sky, and my heart feels like a beautiful star shining like me.
Like a seed searching for the earth, I wandered in search of a place to rest.
I called out to the one who resides on the shore.
Like the moon in the night, I hid within you, and even in the night, I was still a part of the day.
The moon that has gone far away will bring back the time when the rest is lost in the eyes.
